prediction.reasoning: Based on SBUX's historical volatility of approximately 25-30% annually (roughly 1.6-1.9% daily), I estimated a 3-day standard deviation of ~2.8%. The point estimate assumes minimal drift over the short 3-day period. Confidence intervals are constructed using normal distribution assumptions with widening ranges to reflect increased uncertainty at higher confidence levels.
